---
title: "File Uploader"
subtitle: "Full Stack"
description: "Cloud storage application enabling authenticated users to upload files and organize them into folders."
author: Abdullah Zeeshan
date: 2024-11-05
image: ../utils/file-uploader.png
categories:
  - Node.js
  - Express
  - PostgreSQL
  - Prisma ORM
  - Passport
  - EJS
  - Cloudinary
reading-time: true
toc: true
fig-align: center
fig-cap-location: bottom
---


<span class="listing-btn-group">
<a href="https://file-uploader-ewv2.onrender.com/" class="btn" role="button">{{< fa globe >}} Live</a> 
<a href="https://github.com/4bdullah7eeshan/file-uploader" class="btn" role="button">{{< iconify fa github >}} Source Code</a>
</span>
